text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Summer, sand, and sunshine! ☆ This is gonna be
lit!

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: Party tiiiiime! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wooo! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey! I'm shooting a video here, so keep it on
mute!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as break starts, Tosen Jordan and the
others get right to work playing with their phones.
choice_data_list: Okay, we'll pick up our training in two hours.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Where do you think you're going? We've
gotta make the most of the summer! And by the
way, you're on camera duty.

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Could you get one with my phone too? I need
some footage with everyone!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
First up, a watermelon-splitting contest! ☆ We
don't have a stick... but we can break it with our
hands or whatevs. You can handle that, right,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Gyaru B
text_block_list.text:
Haha! The inner tube's ready! ☆ Who wants to
ride?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ☆ I wanna go! Come on, Trainer! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... ♪ Everyone looks so happy. I'll upload the
pics to the group chat!

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: Thanks! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure if they have endless energy just
because they're Umamusume... but Tosen Jordan
and the others continue to enjoy everything the
beach has to offer.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, wanna go and grab some yakisoba
noodles? Gotta eat that summer food!

text_block_list.name: Gyaru C
text_block_list.text: Bet!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You too, Trainer! Go on ahead and grab some
seats.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's my nails. I've gotta put some oil on them. I
went into the water, and I don't want them to dry
out.
choice_data_list: You really take care of them.
You really take care of them.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Duh. What do you take me for?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: 'Scuse meee! Six yakisobas, pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Yakisoba Seller?
text_block_list.text:
Six orders of our diabolically spicy habanero and
ghost pepper special—comin' right up!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
...Oh! It's you! I was wondering why my mouth
started talking all on its own like that. Now it
makes sense.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (This is Gold Ship. She's Tosen Jordan's, uh...)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whatever. What are you doing cooking up noodles? Actually, I don't care—I just want some regular yakisoba!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, too scared, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Am not!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Am not!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yikes! That was close! I almost took the bait!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I want regular yakisoba!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Tch... Those wits of yours are quick. Well, you win
some, you lose some. Regular noodles it is.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Order up! Grilled fish cake and mayo power
bowls!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey! This isn't even yakisoba!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, whoa. Simmer down. Don't knock it
till you try it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Is it any good?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Is summer hot?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Brrring! ☆ Brrring! ☆ Brrrrrinnng! Hello, thank you for calling Golshi's! ...Oh, a customer! Thank you kindly for your continued patronage.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I've got another order to handle! Don't
wait up for me—tuck in!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh... What just happened?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
About the food we've got here... Do you think it's
safe to eat?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan and I nervously bring the contents
of our bowls to our mouths. And the verdict...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ta-daaa! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Geez! Where did you come fr—cough... Cough!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The food is surprisingly good. It feels as if I might
have gotten a boost of energy.

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Throw down, Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You're on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Tosen Jordan manages to finish all of
Gold Ship's special yakisoba!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So... sp-spicy... I'm dying...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hm! Very impressive, Jordan. Here's some ice
cream as a reward. Eat up...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ice cream?! Ice cream!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hm?! That is sweet! What's in this?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I've never had anything so good!
choice_data_list:
It's probably because you just ate something
spicy.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: If that's true, then...

text_block_list.name: Gyaru C
text_block_list.text:
Could this be... an act of kindness by Golshi? She
knew it'd taste extra good after those spicy
noodles.

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text: That must be it! She did say it was a reward!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Golshi gave us that yakisoba so we could
taste the most incredible ice cream...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh? The heck're you talkin' about? Ice cream's
best when you eat it like normal.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? But...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?
